$comment: Intended model per agent role. This is the ONE deliberate place to change routing; guard_models blocks silent drift (spawn overrides and frontmatter edits that contradict this). The CEO is your main session and is not listed - it runs whatever model you launched Claude Code with.

builtins.$comment: Built-in agent types (Explore, general-purpose, Plan, claude) have no .claude/agents frontmatter pin, so a bare spawn silently inherits the SESSION model - guard_models therefore requires an explicit matching model override for these. The Workflow tool is hook-invisible (its agent() spawns fire no PreToolUse events) and is forbidden by default - see company/METHOD.md.

pricing.$comment: OQ-W1-01 estimate only, NOT billing truth - used by .claude/hooks/cost_capture.py for rough spend visibility in company/state/costs.log and /standup. USD per million tokens (MTok). cache_write is 1.25x input, cache_read is 0.1x input.
